source_pr.title: ddl:fix data race in call_back_test.go
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Because the unit-test has DATA RACE, I'm trying to solve it.

### What is changed and how it works?
Use `atomic` to avoid Data Race.

**Because I am newbie and this problem is hard to reproduce, I'm not confident in what I do.Thanks for your review.**
Thanks♪(･ω･)ﾉ
